channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Redbox goes up for auction following a wild bankruptcy saga
item.description: Redbox is getting ready for one final sale. The defunct DVD rental chain’s assets, and those of its corporate siblings Crackle and Chicken Soup for the Soul Entertainment, are being auctioned off in New York later this month, according to a court filing published Monday morning.
item.dc:creator: Janko Roettgers, Fast Company

item.title: Shopify CEO Tobi Lütke: AI is now a ‘fundamental expectation’ for employees
item.description: Shopify CEO Tobi Lutke shared an internal memo on X on Monday that stressed the importance of using AI effectively in daily tasks. In fact, he wrote, using AI is now a “fundamental expectation” of Shopify employees.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: New Presidential Administration Presents Challenges and Opportunities for Government CIOs
item.description: The transition to a new presidential administration presents significant challenges and opportunities for government Chief Information Officers (CIOs). As with any new leadership, incoming CIOs will face the enormous task of getting up to speed quickly and implementing programs to promote changes needed to achieve the administration's goals.
item.dc:creator: commentators, Federal News Network

item.title: CIOs brace for tariff impacts on tech industry and their businesses
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s escalating tariff war is expected to upend the IT investment plans of global CIOs and greatly impact all sectors of the IT industry in the coming months, slowing adoption of AI and damaging long-established supply chains, perhaps for good.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Appeals panel clears way for DOGE access to sensitive personal data at OPM, Education Department
item.description: A federal appeals panel on Monday paused an order curtailing the Department of Government Efficiency's (DOGE) access to troves of sensitive personal data from three federal agencies, reopening the floodgates for the cost-cutting advisory board. In a 2-1 decision, a panel of judges on the U.S.
item.dc:creator: Ella Lee, The Hill

item.title: AI could affect 40% of all jobs, UN says
item.description: The AI market could grow to as much as $4.8 trillion by 2033, according to a new report from the United Nations Conference on Trade and Development. At the same time, the money is expected to be concentrated among a few players and could increase inequality between countries, CNBC reports.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Bogus report on tariff pause briefly lifted markets before White House denied it
item.description: A bogus rumor that President Donald Trump was considering a pause in tariffs briefly lifted markets Monday before the White House shot down the unfounded reports.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: ChatGPT subscribers are getting frustrated with Sora restrictions and OpenAI outages – and I can't blame them
item.description: OpenAI's capacity issues are continuing to throttle ChatGPT's features and performance for paying subscribers –and that's starting to wear thin.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Does Microsoft know something we don't? Tech giant cools down on AI data center investment as another report claims company pullbacks
item.description: A new report claims Microsoft has stepped away from even more data center projects worth billions of dollars.
item.dc:creator: waynewilliams@onmail.com (Wayne Williams), TechRadar

item.title: De ChatGPT a Chief AI Officer: el cambio en la era de los agentes digitales
item.description: Andrés Pazos, con una visión estratégica y pedagógica, abordó los principales retos y oportunidades que plantea la IA en múltiples sectores, desde la salud hasta el marketing, sin evitar asuntos espinosos como su elevado gasto energético o el miedo a utilizarla por el riesgo de infringir los derecho
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Silicon Valley isn’t pushing back on Trump’s immigration crackdown. It should be
item.description: President Donald Trump has just expanded the social media surveillance system for immigrants. Starting in May, the United States will begin collecting the social media handles of all permanent resident applicants.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Windows 11’s rumored Start menu redesign could mean it eats up a huge chunk of desktop space for some users – although it can be tamed
item.description: Microsoft seems to be giving Windows 11 users what they want, namely more control over the Start menu.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Nvidia RTX 5060 Ti Leaks Continue Amid Launch Rumors
item.description: Nvidia's RTX 5060 Ti has appeared in multiple sightings, reinforcing rumors around this GPU that's expected to launch next week.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: The White Lotus season 3 finale has Mike White already thinking of where the hit Max series should go next
item.description: The White Lotus season 3 finale has only just been released and Mike White is already talking about where he'd like to take the Max show next.
item.dc:creator: amelia.schwanke@futurenet.com (Amelia Schwanke), TechRadar

item.title: The benefits of supercharging ITSM with automation
item.description: IT Service Management (ITSM) has long been the backbone of operational efficiency in modern businesses. However, as IT demands grow and systems become increasingly complex, IT teams often face challenges when it comes to keeping up.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: The Tesla Cybertruck’s range-extending battery pack has stealthily disappeared, suggesting the project might be dead
item.description: The Tesla Cybertruck's range-extending battery pack appears to have disappeared from its online store.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra Leaks Reveal Camera, Charging Capabilities
item.description: Get the latest information on the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra, with leaks revealing details about its camera, charging capabilities, and S Pen.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: DoubleClickjacking hack turns double-clicks into account takeovers
item.description: Double-clicking is something we all do, often without giving it a second thought. But it could be giving hackers permission to do something dangerous.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Nintendo delays Switch 2 US preorders over Trump tariffs
item.description: Nintendo said U.S. preorders of its Switch 2 console will not take place on April 9 as it assesses tariff implications.
item.dc:creator: Jeff Arnold, NewsNation

item.title: An AI avatar tried to argue a case before a New York court. The judges weren't having it
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It took only seconds for the judges on a New York appeals court to realize that the man addressing them from a video screen — a person about to present an argument in a lawsuit — not only had no law degree, but didn't exist at all.
item.dc:creator: LARRY NEUMEISTER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: NetBox Labs launches drift detection tool to tame configuration chaos
item.description: NetBox Labs this week made available a new product that will help network teams detect and remediate configuration drift across sophisticated network environments before costly service disruptions or unplanned downtime affect services or applications.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: FBI warns about new extortion scam targeting sensitive data
item.description: According to the FBI, cybercriminals are sending extortion letters, threatening to release victims' sensitive information unless a ransom is paid.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Why no one is challenging Trump's executive order that keeps TikTok running
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — After TikTok was banned in the United States earlier this year, President Donald Trump gave the platform a reprieve, barreling past a law that was passed in Congress and upheld unanimously by the Supreme Court that said the ban was necessary for national security.
item.dc:creator: SARAH PARVINI and MARK SHERMAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Detroit production of Mozart opera turns its female characters into automatons
item.description: DETROIT (AP) — Audiences at the Detroit Opera House expecting their performance of “Cosi fan tutte" to begin with the overture may be surprised to hear instead a product launch from a tech company CEO.
item.dc:creator: MIKE SILVERMAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
